SuiFren – The Meme Frog of Sui

Community-powered. Meme-fueled. Join the $FREN movement.

Buy $FREN Follow $FREN

What is SuiFren?

SuiFren is a meme token built on the Sui blockchain. With a smiling frog at its core, $FREN represents friendship, fun, and community-first values. No complicated roadmap, just vibes—and maybe the moon.

Tokenomics

  • Liquidity Pool: 50%
  • Community Airdrop: 20%
  • Marketing Fund: 15%
  • Team Reserve: 10%
  • Dev/Utility Fund: 5%

Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 FREN

How to Buy $FREN

  1. Create a Sui Wallet (e.g., Sui Wallet, Martian)
  2. Fund it with SUI from an exchange
  3. Visit a Sui DEX (e.g., Aftermath, Turbos)
  4. Swap SUI for $FREN
  5. Hold and meme with the frens

The Fren Plan

  • Q2 2025: Token launch + airdrops
  • Q3 2025: Meme contests, influencer raids
  • Q4 2025: Merch drops + NFT frens
  • 2026: DAO voting + Moonbase (or not)
